curation.synopsis: Lubentina is a shrine world living off the pilgrims who flock to the cathedral that holds the relics of Vadok Singh, the Warmason. When militia patrols start vanishing into the back-alleys, Sister Superior Trishala of the Order of the Sombre Vow follows the rumours and uncovers what no shrine world is meant to harbour: a hidden brood of genestealer cultists, generations deep, ready to surface. Her distress signal is intercepted before it can reach the Imperium proper — and answered by exactly the wrong listeners. Cornak, an Iron Warriors sorcerer hungry for the Warmason's secrets, drags the warband of Warsmith Rhodaan into a planet-side war for the cathedral's vaults. Three forces collide across the shrine city: a small order of Battle-Sisters defending their holiest relics, an Iron Warriors strike force grinding through the streets, and a cult that has been waiting under the basilicas for decades to call down its true gods.
